name: Kelly
subject: at the Kochs' beck and call

body:

**[Or, donate a different amount](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2efe/7377f838/3d3dd720/51f9c257/2035652300/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-kochbuy?refcode=20180705.2nd")**
Peter, it is isn't a coincidence that Indiana's Senate race is likely to be one of the most expensive in the country. This could be a $100 million race, and it's all because Joe stands up to the most extreme and wealthy wing of the GOP, like when he voted NO on the Trump/McConnell tax scam.

**Republican special interests in Washington are desperate to secure more yes votes for their pocketbooks, and they 're sparing no expense when it comes to attacking Joe.** It's why the Koch brothers' billionaire political network is launching a six-figure advertising campaign against Democrats like Joe who opposed President Trump's most recent cuts to government programs, like the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP) and the Land Water Conservation Fund.

**They 're furious that Joe isn't a copy machine for Mitch McConnell and every single piece of the Trump agenda**, so now they're going all out to try to replace him with someone who will be at their beck and call instead -- **someone like extreme GOP Rep. Mike Braun.**

But that's not how our democracy should work, Peter. Super wealthy campaign donors shouldn't be able to buy politicians who will pass policies designed exclusively to make them richer -- **yet that 's EXACTLY what the Kochs are trying to do!**

The good news is that we don't have to match their millions dollar for dollar -- we just need the resources to get Joe's message out and execute our organizing strategy. [**Will you pitch in to help us take on the Kochs and BEAT Republican Rep. Mike Braun on Election Day?**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2efe/7377f838/3d3dd720/51f9c258/2035652300/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-kochbuy?refcode=20180705.2nd&amount=25")

Thanks,

Kelly

---
Peter, A corrupt cabinet leader has resigned. Scott Pruitt no longer leads the EPA. A single tree has fallen in a forest of corruption.

For months, we’ve known that** [Pruitt abused his position](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1577340/8459284/-1230539132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2QzMDUyMi0xNTgxLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N590cdzm0Bkja3IVRumtLMVIPeY2Ogp2e1aA0js9WfA=)** to buy himself extravagant perks, seek high-paid appointments for his wife and friends, and conduct activities in secret on the public dime. **Of most concern for future generations, Pruitt rolled back essential protections for clean air and clean water.**

And up until the end, the President defended him, saying "he's done an incredible job. He's been very courageous."

**This culture of corruption has tentacles that spread to the Texas 10th.** We have an incumbent who takes money from private prison operators and then uses his office to expand their programs. Who takes money from telecoms and then supports the end of Net Neutrality.

As you know, **this corruption has a cost — in lives, and in lost opportunities**.

**Every dollar stolen is a lost benefit for the people**. Pruitt’s thieving is at the cost of our healthcare. Trump’s golf retreats leave less for Social Security. These brazen abuses are not only hypocrisy in action. They are crimes that hurt us all.

**[Help me fight this culture of corruption](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1577341/8459285/484216227?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2QzMDUyMi0xNTgxLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N590cdzm0Bkja3IVRumtLMVIPeY2Ogp2e1aA0js9WfA=)**. Let's take back the 10th, and let's take back Congress — for the people. With respect,
Mike

name: The White House
subject: The jobs keep coming
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c6cd68c252a97a626f83d6ce4b6b9dc0827d75261b95ac6132953fd5d0bafd3dd1854dcb31d4e26dfaf1fb43fe5babf1d086d87c7e71257d) The White House • July 6, 2018
## The Day Ahead
Vice President Mike Pence will deliver remarks to employees of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement in Washington, D.C. |
---
|

## The jobs keep coming
**The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics** released its monthly jobs report today, revealing that more than 200,000 jobs were added to the economy last month. Average hourly earnings for workers increased, as well.
**Critics' pessimistic predictions** about the U.S. economy under President Trump have not held up. Business fixed investment grew by 9.2 percent during the first quarter of 2018, while hourly compensation for private-sector workers grew at a 4 percent annual rate--the fastest pace in at least 12 years.
**The President's tax cuts played a huge part**. "Not only are American firms putting money back to work in the U.S., but foreign firms are as well," Council of Economic Advisers Chairman Kevin Hassett said. Treasurer of the United States Jovita Carranza called tax cuts a "great, great return for the taxpayers."
[The Trump job boom continues to pull workers off the sidelines. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c6cd68c252a97a62aa43286fe861d70d5af3ea4ef1669870bb83af0fd8db8b231d6eff99a25c15389ec9bc5c3d592a09f7df7f0464053845)
**Throwback** : ["We ran out of words to describe how good the job numbers are."](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c6cd68c252a97a629af26c5bdb64e98d791ff81894dc38baebf7b2a6e6ae277013bb08682a9bc965b12cc325b71df7dc0d17489c54c90081)

---
|

## Who will President Trump nominate to the Court?
**On Monday, President Trump will announce his nominee** to replace retiring Justice Anthony Kennedy as the Supreme Court's next Associate Justice. "Justice Kennedy has been a tireless voice for individual rights and the Founders' enduring vision of limited government," the President said.
**Stay up to date** on President Trump's nominee, the confirmation process, and the larger fight to restore the rule of law in America using the link below. When Justice Neil Gorsuch was confirmed to the High Court last year, President Trump called his nomination process "one of the most transparent and accessible in history."
[Sign up to learn more about President Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c6cd68c252a97a623964499becdfb4ca37f91660b797a8dc8b71ff41d2f3eca0bfe0b096a8aae1ed90691e4e3767b3704b117dfb4d4e7adf)

---
|

## Video of the week: Fourth of July, behind the scenes
**President Trump and the First Lady** hosted military families and other guests on the South Lawn Wednesday for Independence Day. Take an inside look at what goes into putting on a White House celebration for thousands of visitors.
[Watch: Getting the White House ready for the Fourth of July](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c6cd68c252a97a62f44c73a84c97db4072fc29022cafed5501fa7078888f3e15d8e94e7c4bb2e641d34573f990f12101afa2badf68285228)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump watch 4th of July fireworks at the White House** | July 4, 2018

clean_body: Your 1600 Daily: | | The White House • July 6, 2018 The Day Ahead Vice President Mike Pence will deliver remarks to employees of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement in Washington, D.C. | | The jobs keep coming The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics released its monthly jobs report today, revealing that more than 200,000 jobs were added to the economy last month. Average hourly earnings for workers increased, as well. Critics' pessimistic predictions about the U.S. economy under President Trump have not held up. Business fixed investment grew by 9.2 percent during the first quarter of 2018, while hourly compensation for private-sector workers grew at a 4 percent annual rate--the fastest pace in at least 12 years. The President's tax cuts played a huge part. "Not only are American firms putting money back to work in the U.S., but foreign firms are as well," Council of Economic Advisers Chairman Kevin Hassett said. Treasurer of the United States Jovita Carranza called tax cuts a "great, great return for the taxpayers." Throwback : | Who will President Trump nominate to the Court? On Monday, President Trump will announce his nominee to replace retiring Justice Anthony Kennedy as the Supreme Court's next Associate Justice. "Justice Kennedy has been a tireless voice for individual rights and the Founders' enduring vision of limited government," the President said. Stay up to date on President Trump's nominee, the confirmation process, and the larger fight to restore the rule of law in America using the link below. When Justice Neil Gorsuch was confirmed to the High Court last year, President Trump called his nomination process "one of the most transparent and accessible in history." | Video of the week: Fourth of July, behind the scenes President Trump and the First Lady hosted military families and other guests on the South Lawn Wednesday for Independence Day. Take an inside look at what goes into putting on a White House celebration for thousands of visitors. | Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump watch 4th of July fireworks at the White House | July 4, 2018 | |

name: Mel Hall
subject: Here before we know it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
We've got four months, on the button, until we head to the polls, friends.

Every day between now and then, my team and I will make critical decisions on how to get our message out to voters before Election Day--decisions that will be made based on our available resources.

**[I know you believe in that message, which is why I 'm asking you to chip in $5 or more to our campaign, today, so we have the resources we need to make this campaign a success.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5uiTw5PH0_Pj5nAU6cil0JPypJPIHmsWCUmYlT4PxAA=/g7-A9U6gBbtbwuemu8o2FDMMP9_tGqDJtj2RxCc2YO8=?refcode=em180706)**

When I think about Election Day, I think about all the people I've met during this campaign. They are why I wake up every day determined to bring accountability and transparency to Washington.

It's for the retirees I've met who are counting on Congress to protect their health care. And for the Honeywell employees I stood arm in arm with in South Bend, who don't know how they'll make ends meet if their jobs are shipped overseas. And for the families across our district who are forced to choose between much-needed health care and financial security.

They all have one thing in common--the need for a representative who will fight for them and bring Hoosier common sense to Washington D.C. We can make that happen on November 6, but I need your help.

**Donate $5, or whatever you can, to keep up the momentum for our campaign.**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/5uiTw5PH0_Pj5nAU6cil0JPypJPIHmsWCUmYlT4PxAA=/xcGW0_xJpxGECOlAoJT9a9SRg62W_vOwMIbS50Pfk8I=?refcode=em180706)

Mel Hall

name: Take Action [via Rosen For Nevada]
subject: don't take away our care (sign on)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is serious -

President Trump's Justice Department recently announced that it believes the law ensuring coverage protections for those with pre-existing conditions is unconstitutional.

That's right: they believe insurance companies should be able to charge more money based on your medical history. This will likely drastically raise the cost of health insurance for hundreds of thousands of Nevadans and millions of Americans.

**[It's not okay, and we must do everything we can to defend these crucial protections. Right now, we need 500 dedicated supporters like you to step up and join us in demanding coverage protections for pre-existing conditions. Add your name right away. ](https://secure.rosenfornevada. "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=rosen-nd&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=rosen")**
We should expand Nevadans' access to health care, not make it harder to get the coverage they need. This move by the Trump administration will only harm our communities.
****[Add your name right away to demand coverage protections for pre-existing conditions.](https://secure.rosenfornevada. "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=rosen-nd&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=rosen")****
Thanks for taking a stand,

Team Rosen

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6a2/4fbb2af3/7d13cce3/5e8bd0db/2373874770/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). name: Jason Yates
subject: Duck Dynasty’s Phil Robertson Message on Virtuous Leadership
body:
Peter,
I’m excited to share with you an article Phil Robertson wrote for My Faith Votes titled, [Virtuous Leadership in America](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Farticles%2Fvirtuous-leadership-in-america%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180706com01&n=1).
Phil diagnoses the problem in America with a simple and down to earth approach better than anyone else.
Peter, as we wrap up celebrating Independence Day this week, it’s a perfect time to take a couple of minutes to read Phil’s common-sense Biblically grounded approach to the situation America is in today.
[Phil Robertson: Virtuous Leadership in America](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Farticles%2Fvirtuous-leadership-in-america%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180706com01&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180706com01&n=3)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180706com01&n=4).

name: Osmack for Missouri
subject: This is not normal, and it is not the way our government should be run.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri
body:
| | Friends, Did you see former EPA Administrator Scott Pruitt's resignation letter to President Trump? Here's an excerpt... [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lD62e2kF60fURT-xs0W77gmajZYEH6PQjEuFbLCegJw=/fxrkT-e9tyhtii0MmP014lSTAlUpwriQYMkpgp3UKrk=) Today, we have a culture in Washington, DC that turns a blind eye to obvious corruption. Members of the Trump Administration are selected not for their qualifications or merit but solely for their loyalty to the President. This is not normal, and it is absolutely not the way our government should be run. We need leaders who will hold this administration accountable to the people of the United States, not to a divisive President. Scott Pruitt was committed to slashing the regulations, funding, and protections that keep our environment safe. Climate change is real, and we are already feeling the effects of irresponsible environmental policy: [extreme weather](https://act.myngp.com/el/lD62e2kF60fURT-xs0W77gmajZYEH6PQjEuFbLCegJw=/F1kr7gk_JQI3lNmTcDJf42RsdScUoiN6cZc0tNLAxas=), toxic health hazards like [St. Louis's West Lake Landfill](https://act.myngp.com/el/lD62e2kF60fURT-xs0W77gmajZYEH6PQjEuFbLCegJw=/ohdgWx2766ZD57PrLLi4XcormQ4ZwB80sAG_peYkqZM=), and the [disproportionate effects on people of color and low-income families](https://act.myngp.com/el/lD62e2kF60fURT-xs0W77gmajZYEH6PQjEuFbLCegJw=/vbA0zxAwHdK2mTWJ-1QmeVjpTjkI7ZSlBy3Wa1xZceo=). But it's not enough for us to know what's happening: we must aggressively and decisively confront corporate influence, pass strong, smart legislation, and create a sustainable society. I'm ready to stand up to this administration and to stand up for you. Will you join me? Mark Osmack [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lD62e2kF60fURT-xs0W77gmajZYEH6PQjEuFbLCegJw=/L8CibOtJzIOaFcBgZybUK6wwIGkotj2UsHRd5aucdaQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lD62e2kF60fURT-xs0W77gmajZYEH6PQjEuFbLCegJw=/BUch4O_qeAWAnVeEBHqYjrEEts95b2ZafSF7yaHAMeQ=)
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lD62e2kF60fURT-xs0W77gmajZYEH6PQjEuFbLCegJw=/koQ6ZvGU9QWP8rYDCsDusfe7_qfLQmNcHSykJXDqOUk=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lD62e2kF60fURT-xs0W77gmajZYEH6PQjEuFbLCegJw=/xYYg9wWDJorR7QLr4bQTvsMK_TfM3Ac7ew2EKhdrWig=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lD62e2kF60fURT-xs0W77gmajZYEH6PQjEuFbLCegJw=/xl5y5jGi68YowyqLL_V9HZl4FR1dLpxSwc4yuDg4A20=)
Paid for by Osmack for Missouri
---
Osmack for Missouri

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Tim knows that our most valuable resource as a campaign is our supporters - all of you. So we're coming to you directly to help craft our strategy and our message.
|

[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1270/3e0906/686e95cc/3e3586e7/2143375368/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180706_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv&source=20180706_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hey Derek!

This July we're taking to the road to talk to concerned voters, neighborhood leaders, small business owners, and even some loyal house pets! [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1270/3e0906/686e95cc/3e3586e6/2143375368/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/general-election-survey?source=20180706_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20180706_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv") | [**Be a part of our General Election Strategy Team ->**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1270/3e0906/686e95cc/3e3586e5/2143375368/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/general-election-survey?source=20180706_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Be+a+part+of+our+General+Election+Strate&utm_campaign=20180706_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv")
---
But here's the thing - even if we don't see you out and about this summer, we still want to hear what you think about our campaign, the state of our country, and what issues matter most this year.

[Will you take a moment to fill out our General Election Survey?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1270/3e0906/686e95cc/3e3586e4/2143375368/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/general-election-survey?source=20180706_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Will+you+take+a+moment+to+fill+out+our+G&utm_campaign=20180706_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv")

As I'm sure you know, we're facing a divisive and extreme opponent this fall.

We want to make sure we stay focused on the issues that matter most to people, while continuing to advocate for a Virginia that works for all - _NOT a rhetoric of discord and hate._

**Tim knows that our most valuable resource as a campaign is our supporters - all of you, Derek. So we 're coming to you directly to help craft our strategy and our message:**

[Your responses matter! Take just a minute to give us your feedback so that your ideas can factor into our 2018 General Election strategy.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1270/3e0906/686e95cc/3e3586fb/2143375368/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/general-election-survey?source=20180706_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Your+responses+matter+Take+just+a+minute&utm_campaign=20180706_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv")

Looking forward to reading these,

_Tim Kaine for Virginia 2018_

name: Florida Voting Alert (via AndrewGillum.com)
subject: Poll: (1) One response needed
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3016/9e00690/59012dcb/2402da7f/3945661401/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180705_ppsurv_engg_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_180705_ppsurv_engg_gq_act__TG_ettx")
**"Do you think it's critical more Democratic voters get to the polls in Florida elections?"**
[YES](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3016/9e00690/59012dcb/2402da7e/3945661401/VEsE/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/take-the-suvery-pre-primary?gpsid=13_55_1844&source=em18_180705_ppsurv_engg_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180705_ppsurv_engg_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+YES") | [NO](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3016/9e00690/59012dcb/2402da71/3945661401/VEsF/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/take-the-suvery-pre-primary?gpsid=13_55_1844&source=em18_180705_ppsurv_engg_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180705_ppsurv_engg_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+NO")
---|---

Friends,

Across the board in 2016, voter turnout dropped to a 20-year low, including black turnout.

And with the GOP funneling massive amounts of money to drown out the voices of progressives, Democrats need to make their voices heard in November.

Here in Florida, this election isn't just about the next four years -- it's about the next 40. And it all comes down to us. These last two races for governor we have lost by less than one percent of the vote. Many of those votes are right here in our communities. Many of those voters feel talked past, ignored, uninspired.

Andrew Gillum is fighting to make sure folks have the opportunity to make their voices heard and is making sure they're registered to vote in this year's critical elections. But he needs your input as we move forward.

Long-term change requires grassroots support from people like you. So we need to know, do you think it's critical for Democrats to vote this year? **[Take the survey today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3016/9e00690/59012dcb/2402da70/3945661401/VEsC/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/take-the-suvery-pre-primary?gpsid=13_55_1844&source=em18_180705_ppsurv_engg_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180705_ppsurv_engg_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+Take+the+survey+today")**

Thanks,

Team Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3016/9e00690/59012dcb/2402da73/3945661401/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-july-2018?gpsid=13_55_1796&refcode=em18_180705_ppsurv_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180705_ppsurv_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=5+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Look, this is no ordinary time
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/NXUVphpWwjZ9s6Q7N-LCrA==/WL6WpWlWrhmeTEy8zafh1g==?gpsid=31_60_1864&refcode=em18_180706_McGinty_fnd_gq_cust__KM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180706_McGinty_fnd_gq_cust__KM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=swal)
Hello,

This fall we have a chance to reshape our congress and create a government that better represents the people and the spirit of our nation. We need leaders in that government who will fight for their constituents, not special interests.

From his work investigating the effects of Agent Orange on Vietnam veterans to his family's international nonprofit fighting for women's rights -- Scott Wallace has proven he is that type of leader.

**That 's why I'm proud to support Scott. I'm ready to do whatever I can to help him win in November.**

[**Will you chip in $5 or more right now to join me in supporting Scott Wallace for Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NXUVphpWwjZ9s6Q7N-LCrA==/WL6WpWlWrhmeTEy8zafh1g==?gpsid=31_60_1864&refcode=em18_180706_McGinty_fnd_gq_cust__KM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180706_McGinty_fnd_gq_cust__KM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=swal)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/NXUVphpWwjZ9s6Q7N-LCrA==/WL6WpWlWrhmeTEy8zafh1g==?gpsid=31_60_1864&refcode=em18_180706_McGinty_fnd_gq_cust__KM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180706_McGinty_fnd_gq_cust__KM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=swal)
---
This is no ordinary time -- after three Supreme Court rulings targeting women, the working class, and immigrants, Justice Kennedy announced his retirement. More than ever we need a pro-choice, pro-working families, progressive leader like Scott fighting for us in Congress.

Scott is backed by a broad coalition of progressive organizations, from End Citizens United and the Planned Parenthood Action Fund to Friends of the Earth and local unions representing our brothers and sisters in labor. He'll be the champion working Pennsylvanians need in Congress.

[**Scott needs our help to keep building his campaign backed by the people, not dark money. Chip in $5 or more to Scott Wallace for Congress right now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NXUVphpWwjZ9s6Q7N-LCrA==/WL6WpWlWrhmeTEy8zafh1g==?gpsid=31_60_1864&refcode=em18_180706_McGinty_fnd_gq_cust__KM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180706_McGinty_fnd_gq_cust__KM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=swal)

Thank you,

Katie McGinty

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/NXUVphpWwjZ9s6Q7N-LCrA==/WL6WpWlWrhmeTEy8zafh1g==?gpsid=31_60_1864&refcode=em18_180706_McGinty_fnd_gq_cust__KM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180706_McGinty_fnd_gq_cust__KM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=swal)

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Intolerance and ignorance are unacceptable in the Florida Cabinet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LfnlziChVq3TZLEJciO81SsYyF5nfpOP-0VVTkMTiEA=/sYkaH9jbbFMXXvJX0Zw6X1mNnsQkEhq1clTgEvYp8AA=) Friends and Neighbors -- Just imagine -- after years of waiting -- finally having the opportunity to get your civil rights back in form of the ability to vote. Wouldn't it feel like a brand new opportunity, a fresh start? But what if the first question you get, in the process, is _" how many kids do you have?"_ And _" How many different mothers are there, for each of those children?"_ You would be taken aback, right? I know I was, when I **[read the new report today in the _Florida Phoenix_](https://act.myngp.com/el/LfnlziChVq3TZLEJciO81SsYyF5nfpOP-0VVTkMTiEA=/VDU7JyheH2I5CzrvkjjbliOGpfYMbXs4ebtpYmUQx5g=)** , detailing some of the uncomfortable - and incredibly tone deaf - questions asked of applicants seeking to have their voting rights restored by the current State Clemency Board, on which our current Chief Financial Officer, (CFO), Jimmy Patronis, sits. A line of questioning CFO Patronis actively participated in. **This is totally unacceptable.** It is unconscionable that applicants would be asked in a public hearing how many children and how many different mothers of those children. Not only should that have zero to do with Mr. Jones ability to have his rights restored, but smacks of racism, intolerance and ignorance. CFO Patronis should issue an immediate apology. [Help JR Get to the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/LfnlziChVq3TZLEJciO81SsYyF5nfpOP-0VVTkMTiEA=/Eqt7Qvjlrbt0Ao6cuvGITN7cGULeKddXujMC-d6VFqs=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) This is just another example of why the current Florida Clemency process is unfair and tainted. It's no wonder a Federal Judge recently ruled that Governor Scott and the Florida Cabinet issued a ruling to reform the entire practice of rights restoration. Currently, the clemency process is used to not only suppress votes but to ensure that "all" non violent ex-felons are never given an opportunity to lift themselves up and pursue their dreams. **And it 's another reason why I threw my hat into the "ring" for this race.** As your next CFO, I would make reforming our Clemency process a top priority, to make sure that all applicants are treated fairly and equally and that the restoration of civil rights are the focus of all proceedings, not stereotypical, irrelevant lines of questioning. But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help****.** [**Can you contribute $20.18 or more today, to help me reform our Clemency process and bring fairness back to the Cabinet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LfnlziChVq3TZLEJciO81SsYyF5nfpOP-0VVTkMTiEA=/Eqt7Qvjlrbt0Ao6cuvGITN7cGULeKddXujMC-d6VFqs=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/LfnlziChVq3TZLEJciO81SsYyF5nfpOP-0VVTkMTiEA=/EsqXJ3u8XyQWiACiaKuM_vk8D0X6gJjDvD5_Zt1jyyY=).

As your next CFO, I would make reforming our Clemency process a top priority, to make sure that all applicants are treated fairly and equally and that the restoration of civil rights are the focus of all proceedings, not stereotypical, irrelevant lines of questioning. But I have an election to win first. And I can 't do it without your help. & Thank you for all of your support, Jeremy Ring | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer PO Box 670311 Coral Springs FL 33067 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. .

| | | Friends - I am reaching out to say thank you. Thank you for supporting our campaign in every way that you can. Our team, with your help, not only reached our ambitious fundraising goal -- we surpassed it. **And more importantly, we shattered our previous small-dollar donor record. We're not kidding when we say that our movement for progress is people-powered.** Every dollar, every donation from supporters like you, helps Team Abrams lead Georgia forward. We're reaching out to voters across our state - especially those who don't think their voices matter - and giving people a reason to cast a ballot on Election Day. name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: [Hold Blue Seats] 10 Senate + 14 House + 3 governors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c42db/24c69fd9/18a834cd8/1883265b/3533799037/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES12N_digital_email_20180706_WhyHoldBlues_inact&source=WQEFES12N_digital_email_20180706_WhyHoldBlues_inact")
---

Peter,

It's no secret: We love turning red seats blue.

But flipping seats is only half the battle. We also have to hold onto the blue seats we already have if we want to make big gains in November.

We can't take back the Senate if we don't protect all 10 of our women currently serving there. Our chances of flipping the House slip if we don't elect the 14 women we've endorsed to hold blue seats.

And we have so few Democratic governors' seats already, we have to elect the three women we've endorsed to hold onto them to protect choice at the state level.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women hold blue seats up and down the ballot.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c42db/24c69fd9/18a834cd8/18832654/3533799037/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180706_email_WhyHoldBlues?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFES12N_digital_email_20180706_WhyHoldBlues_inact&source=WQEFES12N_digital_email_20180706_WhyHoldBlues_inact")**

Many of the women we've endorsed to hold blue seats are candidates up for re-election whose voices we can't afford to lose: Senate champions like Elizabeth Warren (MA) and Mazie Hirono (HI); House fighters like Stephanie Murphy (FL-07) and Nanette Barragan (CA-44); and our only two EMILY's List governors, Kate Brown (OR) and Gina Raimondo (RI).

And we've endorsed women running for blue seats that have opened up while Democrats seek higher office.

We endorsed Susie Lee in Nevada's 3rd Congressional District, which our other endorsed candidate, Jacky Rosen, is vacating to run for the Senate. It's the same story with Deb Haaland in New Mexico's 1st, which Michelle Lujan Grisham is vacating to run for governor.

We can make sure pro-choice Democratic women continue representing and advocating for these districts.

And it will help fortify our chances of flipping entire chambers from red to blue.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women running to keep seats blue:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hold-Blue-Seats](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c42db/24c69fd9/18a834cd8/18832655/3533799037/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180706_email_WhyHoldBlues?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHoldBlueSeats&utm_campaign=WQEFES12N_digital_email_20180706_WhyHoldBlues_inact&source=WQEFES12N_digital_email_20180706_WhyHoldBlues_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c42db/24c69fd9/18a834cd8/18832656/3533799037/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180706_email_WhyHoldBlues?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFES12N_digital_email_20180706_WhyHoldBlues_inact&source=WQEFES12N_digital_email_20180706_WhyHoldBlues_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Celebrating America
body:
This Independence Day week, I'm taking some time to celebrate. I'm with my family celebrating America, our great country, and the freedoms our... | | |
---
| |
---
| **_Celebrating America_** This Independence Day week, I'm taking some time to celebrate. I'm with my family celebrating America, our great country, and the freedoms our Founding Fathers won for us 242 years ago.

And I'm also thankful. I'm thankful for the men and women who have served our nation in uniform over the last 242 years (and continue to do so today) who keep that freedom alive for all of us.

It's a freedom that we exercise each time we go to the ballot box, and each time we speak out in support of issues and candidates that matter most to us.

You saw that freedom in full effect at 4th of July festivals throughout the state this week. Our 2018 statewide team -- and a legion of volunteers for **Mike Braun, Connie Lawson, Kelly Mitchell** and **Tera Klutz** \-- were out at parades throughout the state. Together, it's at community gatherings like these that we'll let Hoosiers know about our candidates...and our candidates will continue to listen to the Hoosiers who make it all possible.

I hope you had a fun and safe 4th of July, and will join me in continuing to celebrate America and all that our country stands for -- now and always.

-Kyle Hupfer

_Caption: Indiana Auditor Tera Klutz, U.S. Senate candidate Mike Braun and Indiana Treasurer Kelly Mitchell pause for a quick photo at the CarmelFest parade on Wednesday. _

---
| |
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
| **_Mike Braun Celebrates The 4th!_**
Our U.S. Senate candidate, **Mike Braun** , was busy this 4th of July!

He met with Hoosiers in Lafayette and LaPorte, and then walked in the Lake County Highland Twilight Parade, the CarmelFest Parade, the Boone County 4th of July Parade, and the Noblesville 4th of July Parade. What a great opportunity to celebrate America, and to meet even more Hoosiers across the state!

[Check out this live video](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6fe9d3a710&e=1acd9bb3d6) from CarmelFest, and hear why Mike Braun wasn’t wearing his trademark blue collar shirt on Wednesday!
---
|
---
| | **_Join the GOParty at the Lucas Oil Estate!_**
---
|
---
| **_Your Republican Party Is Throwing a GOParty!_**
You’re invited to join **Governor Eric Holcomb** , **Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer** and our **2018 statewide team **at the Lucas Oil Estate in Carmel for a big GOParty in July!

Enjoy a live performance from My Yellow Rickshaw along with dancing, food, and drinks! This is a fun opportunity to support Governor Holcomb and our entire 2018 statewide team.

Tickets are going fast, so make sure to reserve yours today:
**Individual: [RSVP Here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1a0807be4d&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
Non-Individual (Corporations, PACs, LLPs):[ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=de4cce7b08&e=1acd9bb3d6)[RSVP Here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=810409f7d8&e=1acd9bb3d6)! **
Learn more [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b171d44885&e=1acd9bb3d6), and RSVP to Corinne at [CHerndon@indiana.gop](mailto:CHerndon@indiana.gop)
---
|

**Governor Eric Holcomb** [encourages Hoosiers to download the INDOT app](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=11bc20dc18&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** [i](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=80e9dc3899&e=1acd9bb3d6)[s seeking nominations for the Excellence in Affordable Housing Awa](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9561157f41&e=1acd9bb3d6)[rd](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=77f05b45c2&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[a](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7336e51bff&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ttended the Pulaski County 4H Fair](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4467fd4269&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks** [is supporting a Hoosier judge for the U.S. Supreme Court](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=22e7e181bf&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Todd Rokita** [highlights the benefits of federal tax reform](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dd0c21f6f5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks**[hosts one-on-one constituent meetings](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=05a2ed429f&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Congressman Larry Bucshon**[hosted Navy Secretary Spencer at Naval Surface Warfare Center Crane](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=65d0af25d4&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Our U.S. Senate candidate, Mike Braun , was busy this 4th of July! He met with Hoosiers in Lafayette and LaPorte, and then walked in the Lake County Highland Twilight Parade, the CarmelFest Parade, the Boone County 4th of July Parade, and the Noblesville 4th of July Parade. What a great opportunity to celebrate America, and to meet even more Hoosiers across the state! from CarmelFest, and hear why Mike Braun wasn’t wearing his trademark blue collar shirt on Wednesday! | | | Join the GOParty at the Lucas Oil Estate! | | Your Republican Party Is Throwing a GOParty! You’re invited to join Governor Eric Holcomb , Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer and our 2018 statewide team at the Lucas Oil Estate in Carmel for a big GOParty in July! Enjoy a live performance from My Yellow Rickshaw along with dancing, food, and drinks! This is a fun opportunity to support Governor Holcomb and our entire 2018 statewide team. Tickets are going fast, so make sure to reserve yours today: Individual: ! Non-Individual (Corporations, PACs, LLPs):! Learn more , and RSVP to Corinne at mailto:CHerndon@indiana.gop | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Secretary of State Connie Lawson Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Sen. name: Sen. Brian Schatz
subject: we need Sherrod in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- I met Senator Sherrod Brown in 2012, when I first got to the Senate. As soon as I met him, I saw someone who'd aligned his head with his heart, his Senate priorities with his home-state priorities -- someone who'd figured out a way to create change without being self-important. I can tell you that there is no difference between the guy you sometimes see on TV and who he really is. Sherrod is the real deal. [**I 'm so excited to support him this November, and I hope you are, too. Can you help his re-election campaign by chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: I want to share some stories and make an important ask of you today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Each of us has an important role to play.
#
Peter -
I'm writing you a sort of different note today. Below are some stories we've received from supporters like you about why they joined our team. I'm hoping you feel as inspired as I do when you read them.
Our campaign is about building a grassroots movement, which means each of us -- including you -- has a role to play in taking on the corruption of the political and financial establishment. So I want to share these stories and then ask you to do something important:
_" I'm supporting Zephyr for AG because she knows what needs to be done and because I know that she'll always choose to fulfill her responsibility to the people over the pursuit of personal gain."_ -- Bright from Queens
_" I'm concerned with the fact that prisons are overcrowded for minor offenses - ruining lives. I'm VERY concerned that there are issues that the people want done but we get overridden by lobbyists. Enough!"_ -- Kerry from Nassau County
_" We need more aggressive prosecution of corruption and to specifically fight to protect our institutions from Donald Trump."_ -- John from New York City
Peter, we're coming up on our first fundraising deadline next week, and I need to know you're with us in this fight. We want to generate as many individual donations as possible to show the strength of our grassroots campaign. So I have to ask:
**[Will you make your first online donation to our campaign today? Any amount-- even $5 -- matters because this isn't just about how much we raise, but it's about how many people like you chip in. This is important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e4a/6e822e2f/1bf10013/41727b88/1904438923/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MDYtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180706-full")**
I could not do this alone. It is supporters like you who power our campaign. This is about all of us -- people across our state -- coming together to root out corruption and stand up to corporate interests.
The only way we will win is if we're in this together, so thanks for fighting with us.
\- Zephyr
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e4a/6e822e2f/1bf10013/41727b88/1904438923/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MDYtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180706-full")**

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---

Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e4a/6e822e2f/1bf10013/41727b89/1904438923/VEsC/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. clean_body: Derek, How nice does Governor's Island with Governor Sununu and a special guest sound? Governor Sununu and a special guest will be on Governor's Island in Gilford on July 28th - and it will be the event of the summer. If you really want to win, you can buy as many chances as possible. Drawing will be held on July 26th at 6:00PM. Event details, including exact location and time will be made available to the lucky winner. Good luck! Sincerely, Todd CheewingNHGOP Executive Director | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We’re doing it, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

The word is out about Virginia's 7th District Congressional race. Last week, Larry J. Sabato's Crystal Ball upgraded our race to "Toss-Up." The Washington Post moved us to their "competitive" category. The Wason Center for Public Policy announced that the 7th "Will flip to D."

**And today, the non-partisan Cook Political Report elevated us to "Toss-Up" as well! **

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/y_PjlSkJeboPiU9aoKDz0QqBcmwBqeB2TFKpxX6b6iE=/fA_otq9-VezCvPRZPVKx6lB0aLY-PMpurc0MT-qd_C8=?refcode=070618cook)

To put things in perspective, Virginia's 7th District was widely considered a safe/solid/unwinnable Republican stronghold as recently as last October. But times have changed, and we're the ones who are making it happen.

Moments like this are exceedingly rare in any political race--but in this District, **it 's literally unprecedented.** We're writing history as we speak, and it's up to us to make sure everyone gets the message.

[**Can you help recharge our outreach efforts by making a donation today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/y_PjlSkJeboPiU9aoKDz0QqBcmwBqeB2TFKpxX6b6iE=/fA_otq9-VezCvPRZPVKx6lB0aLY-PMpurc0MT-qd_C8=?refcode=070618cook)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/y_PjlSkJeboPiU9aoKDz0QqBcmwBqeB2TFKpxX6b6iE=/fA_otq9-VezCvPRZPVKx6lB0aLY-PMpurc0MT-qd_C8=?refcode=070618cook)

The only reason we've gotten to this point is because we've put so much time and energy into connecting with the people of the 7th, and **[a contribution from you](https://act.myngp.com/el/y_PjlSkJeboPiU9aoKDz0QqBcmwBqeB2TFKpxX6b6iE=/fA_otq9-VezCvPRZPVKx6lB0aLY-PMpurc0MT-qd_C8=?refcode=070618cook)** will allow us to keep moving forward.

I'm so excited to share this news with you, Peter. It's just further proof that extraordinary things can happen when we all work together. I cannot wait until November.

Sincerely,

Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/y_PjlSkJeboPiU9aoKDz0QqBcmwBqeB2TFKpxX6b6iE=/yHKki4LvMwckhL5F1yy59GSQ-xYG5NpdBRdqSuqC7wA=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/y_PjlSkJeboPiU9aoKDz0QqBcmwBqeB2TFKpxX6b6iE=/ewcDTelAYEfeJ69B8NedxkYqrwVWfSFaFPUw196dBbI=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

body:
Just 2 months ago, I secured the endorsement of the Republican Party of Wisconsin in my run for Senate against liberal Tammy Baldwin.

Friend -

Just 2 months ago, I secured the endorsement of the Republican Party of Wisconsin in my run for Senate against liberal Tammy Baldwin.

And as you might've guessed...

That made us a huge target of the left. They're rallying supporters, they're raising millions of dollars, and they're coming after us.

But I have something they don't... YOU. It's people like you who are fed up with DC politics as usual, and we're ready to end the dysfunction. Your dedication makes my campaign strong and that's why I want you on my team OFFICIALLY.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a15626a05c234049a4ff8fd5589db073&_e=E7nG0mIagjKiu5DkUHwvnDKXKpofiqf98gKRXwM6uYT6wWWUMiTfemrVpedrRzxdndg0Nt0MN8Eizkqo9HzNZMFdmAeU7vO5eznJOC45JyIDCi8WK0h-lp5TAYWRonHLqw_cxMrBQgEAXba93X43olRQySH-XpzpQucwYTpllkWt79ysF2wM7OWi9WWlgExTl04pJ8kgZRYJVP6e9YTj7ghWnXEoWCfSUKlr0yqcWAsS5b-B1_pApFe6EQ5FHWDF). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a15626a05c234049a4ff8fd5589db073&_e=czMU4W6dQGzvR5qQHyR1rqLjz1z1zzfCkgB0iESexxnc2tEIuc1Lclji0npX77Pgp1ys28Fe8yZlJLWhrJOP2rMsQeKHe9Hq5oFDgWWS2V-Hnlz4hANINPE80xInnKhS87F7KYrRcuEGmTwcqjHZoJivOaPJeK0DBFLcNxGpsUKNd-ppZIgJFjzynHqRorvkIZzkCh7L1moEQenoWO_nN8-XzuejPlOcDd4lVnli5z1Q0TigVbUvGOB-6h-ZPSKJYJ_1zA3y9RDlhXWMUBFjZ83MN_Ewj3ljvWjodI7LNoxCIKuQJujCJ1Lx9CVirggQcCTfiS8R6y057IHZGhLHCV7uAsKcOdKoWXm5QvlukpwScW8TOi-FnPE5MlqPs7Jh) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a15626a05c234049a4ff8fd5589db073&_e=czMU4W6dQGzvR5qQHyR1rqLjz1z1zzfCkgB0iESexxl0GRCSYbxbg-dH7rDIFBoRLs1UtmmDD7thk5RZh4iQuadN0S7KU-pp_eYZukN1SuqysZHFMQsvUhT1xxlDjr9AzfueBAyZU8Bd2srFj4fumtQyyKQ05i_SBeinxHEVLsmrlvW_sBy7jAE1Qtr2NCRy7iTy7glLVUqtBp4ENEk19K-OdQ3WEAc2BmKHT6FNO9lPQQSFtEsrL15V1PngFZf5vL6ESaXt3mHyX8Q8xnJ6ApwrhGb-5N1lrw_VYLpPk26fDkt80fSgtujQlc91jb86VTXq8BI_X_ynPY6Rm3xdElzGNQZgDdMofIerB5yEsVhtPwUIjg15r51yXdH6a0Yh) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a15626a05c234049a4ff8fd5589db073&_e=czMU4W6dQGzvR5qQHyR1rqLjz1z1zzfCkgB0iESexxl3SL5_a-4_y365BrCN5LMna4YjuFN4aef6S0P8eo2qq0Fqr0Nv8W9YRmqWWdhrKHJ9P6H7oW1l0guxA6jleI4AYtFtKhMKLRql2WBW-yZHHENFGBsBHaNgthgo58VJPHptVLCX5GklTddIprRo3FamPxk9GuUP9pvYeNYH56J4FiQsStXQeVkxE2Env6tqtr0dFMNZpFI6_M_uXw-aUJ_rfrbrmPZefC0lkAdYzq8tQI15pWPh0iGoLI0MShqqzU6NczRM2GCZpxCjcH2bcxJmbgB0DeMiH57G_jCjLUjVtLEegn054c6UxP_zFqffFI_VboSdLbEY6JVxbvn2ekstXVeVLKsX_f7FB4AhEtNy_Q%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. name: TomOHalleran.com
subject: tell Betsy DeVos: PROTECT public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Betsy DeVos doesn't have her priorities straight.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6338c6/1a8421e1/1a481e146/480f71b7/2292294179/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
Friend, Our public schools are the bedrock of our democracy. Our teachers and staff work hard every day to make sure that every child in Arizona and across our country has the tools, knowledge, and opportunity they need to succeed -- no matter their background or circumstance. _It should go without saying that our government should do everything in its power to support our teachers and improve our public schools -- that 's what Arizona's #RedForEd campaign was all about._ **Unfortunately, the Trump Administration 's Education Department, led by Secretary Betsy DeVos, doesn't have its priorities straight. _DeVos has called for cutting the Education Department 's budget and putting money toward private school vouchers instead._** [**Will you join us in calling on Betsy DeVos to protect our public schools -- not undermine them?**](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6338c6/1a8421e1/1a481e146/480f71b8/2292294179/VEsE/ "http://https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopdevos/?code=ohalleran&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fohalleranty2018%3Frefcode%3Dem_ja_2018.07.06_b1_to_all") | ****[SIGN ON: Tell Betsy DeVos>>](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6338c6/1a8421e1/1a481e146/480f71b8/2292294179/VEsF/ "http://https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopdevos/?code=ohalleran&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fohalleranty2018%3Frefcode%3Dem_ja_2018.07.06_b1_to_all")****
---

Here at Team O'Halleran, we stand firmly with our public school teachers and students. We were big supporters of the #RedForEd campaign, and in Congress, Tom will continue to stand up for quality public education.

[**But we can 't win this fight alone. Add your voice today to call on Betsy DeVos to PROTECT and SUPPORT our public schools!**](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6338c6/1a8421e1/1a481e146/480f71b8/2292294179/VEsC/ "http://https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopdevos/?code=ohalleran&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fohalleranty2018%3Frefcode%3Dem_ja_2018.07.06_b1_to_all")

Thanks,

Team O'Halleran

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_ja_2018.07.06_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6338c6/1a8421e1/1a481e146/480f71bc/2292294179/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6338c6/1a8421e1/1a481e146/480f71bd/2292294179/VEsP/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: Tim Ryan
subject: sabotage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Protecting coverage for those with pre-existing conditions like cancer and chronic illness shouldn't be a partisan issue. That's why President Trump and Jeff Sessions' latest decision makes my blood b | |
---
**_Tell Trump: We need to fix our healthcare system, not sabotage it!_** [ADD YOUR NAME >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c7/5486deaa/29d18d08/dcc6cd2/2412832064/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectTheAffordableCareAct/?code=ryan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftr_july18%3Frefcode%3Dem20180706_acaja") Folks, Protecting coverage for those with pre-existing conditions like cancer and chronic illness shouldn't be a partisan issue. _The New York Times_ reports that Trump's Justice Department will no longer defend the Affordable Care Act in court, endangering the provisions that say insurers can't "deny coverage or raise costs for people with pre-existing conditions." **One advocate calls it Trump 's "most dangerous sabotage effort yet." ** Seriously? We need to FIX our healthcare system, not intentionally sabotage it. [I'm joining with Democratic leaders across the country to demand that the Trump Administration stop attacking the Affordable Care Act. Will you join me?](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c7/5486deaa/29d18d08/dcc6cd2/2412832064/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectTheAffordableCareAct/?code=ryan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftr_july18%3Frefcode%3Dem20180706_acaja") [ADD YOUR NAME](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c7/5486deaa/29d18d08/dcc6cd2/2412832064/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectTheAffordableCareAct/?code=ryan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftr_july18%3Frefcode%3Dem20180706_acaja") If you're reading this, you either have what insurance companies call a "pre-existing condition," or you know someone who does. Diseases like cancer and chronic illnesses don't care who you voted for, what channel you watch, or what you read on Facebook. This is an issue that touches all of us. **And in the richest country in the world, every single person should be able to get the care they need without worrying about the cost. ** [The first step to fixing our healthcare system is to stop intentionally sabotaging it. That's a no-brainer! Join me in demanding that the Trump Administration stop attacking our care.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c7/5486deaa/29d18d08/dcc6cd2/2412832064/VEsC/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectTheAffordableCareAct/?code=ryan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftr_july18%3Frefcode%3Dem20180706_acaja") Thank you, \-- Tim [DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c7/5486deaa/29d18d08/dcc6cd5/2412832064/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_july18?refcode=em20180706_acaja")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c7/5486deaa/29d18d08/dcc6cd4/2412832064/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c7/5486deaa/29d18d08/dcc6cd7/2412832064/VEsB/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |

**Tim Ryan for Congress**

If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c7/5486deaa/29d18d08/dcc6cd7/2412832064/VEsHBw/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! clean_body: Protecting coverage for those with pre-existing conditions like cancer and chronic illness shouldn't be a partisan issue. That's why President Trump and Jeff Sessions' latest decision makes my blood b | | Tell Trump: We need to fix our healthcare system, not sabotage it! "" Folks, Protecting coverage for those with pre-existing conditions like cancer and chronic illness shouldn't be a partisan issue. The New York Times reports that Trump's Justice Department will no longer defend the Affordable Care Act in court, endangering the provisions that say insurers can't "deny coverage or raise costs for people with pre-existing conditions." One advocate calls it Trump 's "most dangerous sabotage effort yet." Seriously? We need to FIX our healthcare system, not intentionally sabotage it. "" "" If you're reading this, you either have what insurance companies call a "pre-existing condition," or you know someone who does. Diseases like cancer and chronic illnesses don't care who you voted for, what channel you watch, or what you read on Facebook. This is an issue that touches all of us. And in the richest country in the world, every single person should be able to get the care they need without worrying about the cost. "" Thank you, \-- Tim "" Update Email Preferences "" "" | | Meet Tim Ryan Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since. | | Tim Ryan for Congress** P.O. Box 189 Niles, Ohio 44446 "" "" Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress

| | | **Scott Pruitt 's resignation triggered our latest grassroots advocacy effort -- and we need _you_!**

**[Tell Trump: Nominate an EPA administrator who will put our environment first!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b671/43d8135f/60f4cfed/5100f75e/2408458812/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/restore-the-epa?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Tell+Trump+Nominate+an+EPA+administrator&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1")**

* * *

Team,

Scott Pruitt may be gone from the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA), but the fight to conserve our environment is far from over:

> _"**Andrew Wheeler** , until now the low-profile deputy administrator at the Environmental Protection Agency, became a likely successor to the scandal-plagued Scott Pruitt Thursday and **an appealing alternative for those hoping to continue to roll back key EPA policies.** " \- The Washington Post_
Andrew Wheeler is a former coal lobbyist and a climate change denier. We can't count on him to put our environment and communities ahead of special interests and personal enrichment. That's why we're organizing RIGHT NOW so we can get an EPA administrator nominee who will actually do their job!

**[We need 10,000 supporters in the next 24 hours to join us and urge President Trump to nominate an EPA administrator who will protect our environment. SIGN ON NOW and help restore the EPA's mission today ->](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b671/43d8135f/60f4cfed/5100f741/2408458812/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/restore-the-epa?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+We+need+10000+supporters+in+the+next+24+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1")**

[TELL TRUMP: RESTORE THE EPA >>](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b671/43d8135f/60f4cfed/5100f740/2408458812/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/restore-the-epa?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+TELL+TRUMP+RESTORE+THE+EPA+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1")
Scott Pruitt not only rolled back key conservation programs that protect our environment and communities, but he also did unprecedented damage to the EPA's reputation.

The next EPA administrator needs to be someone the American public can trust -- not someone cut from the same cloth as Pruitt.

**[That's why we need you to stand with us, friend. ADD YOUR NAME and tell President Trump: Nominate an EPA administrator who will put our environment and communities first!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b671/43d8135f/60f4cfed/5100f743/2408458812/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/restore-the-epa?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+you+to+stand+with&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1")**

Click here to sign: **[http://nm.martinheinrich.com/tell-trump](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b671/43d8135f/60f4cfed/5100f742/2408458812/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/restore-the-epa?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+httpnmmartinheinrichcomtelltrump&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180706_1_1")**

Thanks for your action,

Team Martin Heinrich

| Friends:

There are 123 days until the midterm elections. Are you doing all you can to help us turn the 4th District **BLUE**?

The Hayden for Congress campaign has weekly phone bank sessions on Mondays at our Hot Springs Headquarters from 5:30-7:30. We are located on the third floor of 320 Ouachita Avenue. Join us for popcorn, drinks, and fellowship as we call voters to tell them about the great candidates on the ticket in the 4th Congressional District!

Also, mark your calendar for Canvass Training 101 on Saturday, July 14th, at 10:00 a.m. at our Hot Springs Headquarters. This training will have something for both the seasoned veteran and the election newbie - you don't want to miss it!

As always, thank you for all you do for your community state, and nation. Have a wonderful weekend!

The Hayden for Congress Team

body:
| | | | Survey for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
_*If you are not dpwillis67@gmail.com, please disregard this email._

**Do you think Americans with pre-existing conditions should have access to quality, affordable health care?**
**[YES? ADD YOUR NAME NOW>>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=sinema&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-pre-ex?amount=5&recurring=true&utm_content=1+-+YES+ADD+YOUR+NAME+NOW+gtgt&refcode=KS_EM_PT_90DO_180706_2_2")**
---

The Trump administration is working to weaken protections for people with pre-existing conditions, putting affordable coverage at risk for millions of Americans.

The Justice Department is refusing to defend these protections in court. If the protections go away, people with conditions like cancer, diabetes, heart disease, and asthma -- even pregnancy -- could ALL be overcharged or denied essential coverage.

**[This is simply not right -- we must stand up to defend these protections now.](http://act.kyrstensinema. "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=sinema&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-pre-ex?amount=5&recurring=true&utm_content=2+-+This+is+simply+not+right++we+must+stand+&refcode=KS_EM_PT_90DO_180706_2_2")**

**[ADD YOUR NAME: Join Kyrsten in the fight to protect Americans with pre-existing conditions>>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=sinema&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-pre-ex?amount=5&recurring=true&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+Join+Kyrsten+in+the+fight+&refcode=KS_EM_PT_90DO_180706_2_2")**

Kyrsten is working in Congress to make quality health care more affordable and accessible for all Americans.

She knows affordable care is one of YOUR top priorities. That's why it's one of her top priorities, too. We can't let the Trump administration's attempts to dismantle critical protections for people with pre-existing conditions go unchecked.

**[Help Kyrsten protect access to affordable, quality health care for all of us by adding your name to our petition today! We need every voice on this.](http://act.kyrstensinema. "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=sinema&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-pre-ex?amount=5&recurring=true&utm_content=4+-+Help+Kyrsten+protect+access+to+affordabl&refcode=KS_EM_PT_90DO_180706_2_2")**

**[Protect your care. Add your name!](http://act.kyrstensinema. "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=sinema&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-pre-ex?amount=5&recurring=true&utm_content=5+-+Protect+your+care+Add+your+name&refcode=KS_EM_PT_90DO_180706_2_2")**
Thank you for your support.

Sinema HQ

|
---

Kyrsten is running for the United States Senate because she wants to help Arizonans get their shot at the American dream. She's spent her career fighting for veterans and military families, listening to the middle class, and doing her part to fix a broken Washington.

She can't win this race without support from people like you. You can donate to Sinema for Arizona by [clicking here](http://act.kyrstensinema. name: Team Rosen
subject: McConnell's dream come true
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
**Mitch McConnell's biggest dream is coming true, team: He's worked his whole life for this moment, and he's about to send another far-right, anti-choice Republican to the Supreme Court.**

Just two years ago, McConnell was outraged at the thought of even considering a new justice while President Obama was in office. Now, he's pushing the Senate to rush Donald Trump's latest pick onto the highest court in the land.

**The ONLY way we can stop McConnell from giving Donald Trump his dream Supreme Court is by taking back the Senate and removing him as majority leader - but we need to hear from 750 more Dems by midnight, and we still haven't heard from you, team:**
| | **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell?**
---
| | | [YES](https://secure.rosenfornevada. "http://surveys.signforgood.com/rosen-supreme-court-survey/ctrl?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk810-su-nd")

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

[ ](nh.gop)

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, JULY 6TH**
|
---
**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,

It was a great week to reflect upon and celebrate the freedoms we hold so dear as a country.

Independence Day is a great time to celebrate our national heritage and the values we cherish - and with Independence Day falling on a Wednesday this year, it was the center of the week as our nation is at the center of our thoughts.

As you know, Chairman Jeanie Forrester resigned, effective June 30th, to accept a job working with local government. As I have in the press already, I want to thank Jeanie for her dedicated service and wish her the very best in her new endeavors. I also want to thank her for the efforts she will be continuing on behalf of the Party.

I am honored to serve as your Chairman and I know that we are all committed to winning this November. With your support on so many fronts, we will do just that. We will re-elect Governor Sununu, send two new members of Congress to Washington, expand upon our state house and Executive Council majorities and expand upon our majorities in county office as well.

Working as a team and a united Party, we can achieve anything!

Sincerely,

Wayne MacDonald
