clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, JULY 6TH | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, It was a great week to reflect upon and celebrate the freedoms we hold so dear as a country. Independence Day is a great time to celebrate our national heritage and the values we cherish - and with Independence Day falling on a Wednesday this year, it was the center of the week as our nation is at the center of our thoughts. As you know, Chairman Jeanie Forrester resigned, effective June 30th, to accept a job working with local government. As I have in the press already, I want to thank Jeanie for her dedicated service and wish her the very best in her new endeavors. I also want to thank her for the efforts she will be continuing on behalf of the Party. I am honored to serve as your Chairman and I know that we are all committed to winning this November. With your support on so many fronts, we will do just that. We will re-elect Governor Sununu, send two new members of Congress to Washington, expand upon our state house and Executive Council majorities and expand upon our majorities in county office as well. Working as a team and a united Party, we can achieve anything! Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. NHGOP Raffle! #FireTheIntern Digital Ad PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK Governor Sununu speaking to over 100 new U.S. citizens at their naturalization ceremony on July 4th in Portsmouth! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our spotlight this week shines on our Founding Fathers - those who founded our Republic 242 years ago! They signed a document together that is still revolutionary to this day. It is because of them and their sacrifices that our great American experiment ever started. TWEET** OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | VIDEO OF SENATE PRESIDENT MORSE AT RED TOWN HALL RNC LAUNCHES "PAYCHECK PRESIDENT" WEBSITE House Speaker Gene Chandler Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Senate President Chuck Morse Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Executive Council Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Governor Chris Sununu Web - "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - Web - Facebook - Twitter - Chairman Jeanie Forrester "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 Phone: tel:6032259341 "tel:6032259341" | Email: mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" • • mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Pruitt has RESIGNED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Time to act now before Trump appoints the next climate change denier.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78f7f/2f5ea88d/77dbf908/2cbc14e5/722728960/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pruitt-resigns?utm_source=ema_2018-07-05_pruitt-resigns&refcode=ema_2018-07-05_pruitt-resigns&utm_campaign=pruitt-resigns&utm_medium=ema") _\-- Scott Pruitt, Trump 's E.P.A. Chief Resigns Under Cloud of Ethics Scandals --_ Friend, **This is your win.** To those of you who signed our petitions, made phone calls, walked in the March for Science -- that is what made the difference here. All of you who stood up against Trump's band of climate change deniers and called out Scott Pruitt for undermining the EPA's very mission. This one goes out to the scores of you who took action, the journalists who didn't stop reporting on Pruitt's multiple corruption investigations, and even to the woman who confronted Pruitt in a restaurant and told him to resign: Thank you. But we can't stop now. We can't take our eyes off the ball, not for a minute, to keep the pressure on the Trump administration -- including the next EPA nominee. I'm going to keep up the pressure to oppose their anti-science agenda, starting by standing against Trump administration leaders and nominees in the pockets of big oil. [**We must prepare to act against Trump's reckless administration. Can you chip in $5 right now to celebrate our victory -- and to get ready for the next big fight for our planet?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78f7f/2f5ea88d/77dbf908/2cbc14e5/722728960/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pruitt-resigns?utm_source=ema_2018-07-05_pruitt-resigns&refcode=ema_2018-07-05_pruitt-resigns&utm_campaign=pruitt-resigns&utm_medium=ema") Beyond all the personal, and disturbing, controversies, Scott Pruitt's lasting legacy is his refusal to do anything to protect our clean air, clean water, and fight climate change at this crucial moment when we need to act boldly and quickly. **So, now we must be ready to oppose any Trump nominee who denies climate change and threatens our future. Are you with me?** | [CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78f7f/2f5ea88d/77dbf908/2cbc14e5/722728960/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pruitt-resigns?utm_source=ema_2018-07-05_pruitt-resigns&refcode=ema_2018-07-05_pruitt-resigns&utm_campaign=pruitt-resigns&utm_medium=ema")
---
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78f7f/2f5ea88d/77dbf908/2cbc14e4/722728960/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
